screens.name: Songs library
screens.purpose: Show Goodbye as a selectable chart in the existing song list and viewer.
screens.primary_action: Open a chart from the library

ux_rules: Keep the existing songs workspace layout unchanged for this seed task.
Communicate source uncertainty through summary and chart notes instead of inventing new status UI.
Preserve scanability by keeping the new chart compatible with the current section-system-measure viewer.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: Reuse the current two-pane song library and score viewer without adding controls or changing navigation.
interaction_risks: The new chart could appear more authoritative than the source access actually allows.
Late-song key changes may become hard to scan if section labeling is too vague.
notes: This task is content-focused and should preserve the current editorial songs surface.

constraints: Keep the change additive and localized if possible.
Do not rework the songs UI architecture just to expose one additional chart.
Leave explicit chart notes where the source page was inaccessible.
open_decisions: A future ingestion flow should replace this manual seed with a formal published lead-sheet source.

critical_judgments: The new song should be visible and selectable in the existing library.
The score viewer should keep the modulation structure legible.

visual_constraints: No new visual treatment is required for this seed.
Preserve the established songs workspace styling.
